query:
SELECT 
  customerType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(retailBundleMonthlyCost) as totalBundleRevenue,
  AVG(retailBundleMonthlyCost) as avgBundleCost
FROM customers
GROUP BY customerType;
